property.name: org.eclipse.equinox.p2.description
property.value: jsoup is a Java library for working with real-world HTML. It provides a very convenient API for fetching URLs and extracting and manipulating data, using the best of HTML5 DOM methods and CSS selectors. jsoup implements the WHATWG HTML5 specification, and parses HTML to the same DOM as modern browsers do.

property.name: org.eclipse.equinox.p2.name
property.value: Guava: Google Core Libraries for Java

property.name: org.eclipse.equinox.p2.description
property.value: Guava is a suite of core and expanded libraries that include utility classes, Google's collections, I/O classes, and much more.

property.name: org.eclipse.equinox.p2.description
property.value: Eclipse plugin for Odin language with syntax highlighting and OLS support

property.name: org.eclipse.equinox.p2.description
property.value: Apache Commons Logging is a thin adapter allowing configurable bridging to other, well known logging systems.

property.name: org.eclipse.equinox.p2.description
property.value: International Components for Unicode for Java

property.name: org.eclipse.equinox.p2.description
property.value: The Apache Commons IO library contains utility classes, stream implementations, file filters,file comparators, endian transformation classes, and much more.

property.name: df_LT.pluginName
property.value: TextMate support in Eclipse IDE - Language Configurations

property.name: org.eclipse.equinox.p2.name
property.value: Bundle derived from maven artifact org.jruby.joni:joni:2.1.48

property.name: org.eclipse.equinox.p2.description
property.value: OSGi Companion Code for org.osgi.util.promise Version 1.3.0

property.name: org.eclipse.equinox.p2.description
property.value: Mylyn WikiText provides an extensible framework and tools for parsing, editing and presenting lightweight markup. WikiText has parsers for AsciiDoc, CommonMark, Markdown, MediaWiki, Textile, Confluence, Creole, HTML, TracWiki and TWiki markup, and can be extended to support other languages. WikiText provides Ant tasks for converting lightweight markup to HTML, Eclipse Help, DocBook, DITA and XSL-FO. WikiText also provides an editor for editing such markup within Eclipse, and integrates with the Mylyn task editor causing it to be markup-aware. WikiText provides API for integrating wiki markup capabilities into Eclipse, RCP, stand-alone and server-side applications.

property.name: df_LT.pluginName
property.value: Bundle for Workbench APIs available in e4

property.name: org.eclipse.equinox.p2.name
property.value: Bundle derived from maven artifact org.jruby.jcodings:jcodings:1.0.58

property.name: df_LT.pluginName
property.value: TextMate support in Eclipse IDE - Registry management

property.name: org.eclipse.equinox.p2.description
property.value: OSGi Companion Code for org.osgi.service.prefs Version 1.1.2

property.name: org.eclipse.equinox.p2.description
property.value: OSGi Companion Code for org.osgi.util.function Version 1.2.0

property.name: org.eclipse.equinox.p2.description
property.value: OSGi Companion Code for org.osgi.service.event Version 1.4.1

property.name: org.eclipse.equinox.p2.description
property.value: Eclipse plugin for Odin language with syntax highlighting and OLS support

property.name: df_LT.pluginName
property.value: TextMate support in Eclipse IDE - UI

property.name: org.eclipse.equinox.p2.description
property.value: Contains com.google.common.util.concurrent.internal.InternalFutureFailureAccess and InternalFutures. Most users will never need to use this artifact. Its classes is conceptually a part of Guava, but they're in this separate artifact so that Android libraries can use them without pulling in all of Guava (just as they can use ListenableFuture by depending on the listenablefuture artifact).

property.name: df_LT.pluginName
property.value: Equinox Java Authentication and Authorization Service (JAAS)

property.name: org.eclipse.equinox.p2.description
property.value: Mylyn WikiText provides an extensible framework and tools for parsing, editing and presenting lightweight markup. WikiText has parsers for AsciiDoc, CommonMark, Markdown, MediaWiki, Textile, Confluence, Creole, HTML, TracWiki and TWiki markup, and can be extended to support other languages. WikiText provides Ant tasks for converting lightweight markup to HTML, Eclipse Help, DocBook, DITA and XSL-FO. WikiText also provides an editor for editing such markup within Eclipse, and integrates with the Mylyn task editor causing it to be markup-aware. WikiText provides API for integrating wiki markup capabilities into Eclipse, RCP, stand-alone and server-side applications.

property.name: df_LT.pluginName
property.value: JFace Data Binding for SWT and JFace

property.name: org.eclipse.equinox.p2.name
property.value: Language Server Protocol client for Eclipse IDE (Incubation)

property.name: org.eclipse.equinox.p2.description
property.value: OSGi Companion Code for org.osgi.service.component Version 1.5.1

property.name: org.eclipse.equinox.p2.description
property.value: Implementation of the Declarative Services specification 1.5

property.name: org.eclipse.equinox.p2.description
property.value: YAML 1.1 parser and emitter for Java
